summary: Add meta-KB npm scripts (meta-kb:synthesize, meta-kb:drift, meta-kb:check) to root package.json. Phase 1 validated: synthesis produces 165 records, drift detects 7 issues, advise() includes meta_context with warnings/suggestions/conventions. All tests pass.
root_cause: No convenient npm scripts to run meta-KB synthesis and drift detection. Phase 1 acceptance criteria needed formal validation.
fix_approach: Added 3 npm scripts to root package.json. Ran Phase 1 acceptance criteria: synthesis exit 0 with 165 records, drift exit 0 with 7 drift issues, advise() meta_context present with 1 warning + 2 conventions, bun test exit 0.

validation.notes: Phase 1 complete. All 4 acceptance criteria pass. Ready for Phase 2.
